productDisplayName: UCB Women's Boat Print White Top
description: CompositionWhite boat neck top made of 100% cotton, with inward print and string tie with a V-neck at the backFittingComfortWash care Hand wash in cold water Use mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not wring Do not bleach Do not scrub Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Wash, dry and iron inside out Representing the various facets of womanhood, this top from the united colors of benetton is absolutely stylish with its inward print, where the graphic print is on the inside, and shows outside like a silhouette. The string tie-back enhances its feminine aspect.
